rule_name: Windows - Persistence via Registry Run Key Modification
search_query: index=windows source="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=13 (TargetObject="*\\CurrentVersion\\Run*" OR TargetObject="*\\CurrentVersion\\RunOnce*") | table _time, Computer, User, Image, TargetObject, Details | rename Image as "Malware_Path", Details as "Payload_Executed"
description: Detects modifications to Windows Registry 'Run' or 'RunOnce' keys. Attackers use these keys to ensure their malware executes automatically every time the system starts or a user logs in.
